restructure_brief: Broad cleanup audit of the AVC repo. Surface and address structural improvements: monolith hotspots (app.py 1893 LOC, surfaces.py 1808 LOC), the dual parameter_panel implementations (parameters_panel.py vs parameter_grid_panel.py), missing top-level files (LICENSE, CHANGELOG, AGENTS.md, pyproject.toml), the src-vs-flat layout question for an 11-file flat app, the four panel files at root that could group into panels/, and any AI-navigability gaps. The current layout is flat: 11 .py files at root, tests/ directory, .claude/ and .github/ standard tool folders. AI-1..AI-15 invariants from .claude/references/app-invariants.md are inviolable. Conservative bias: prefer low-risk wins (panels/ subpackage, AGENTS.md symlink, dead-code consolidation if parameter_grid_panel.py supersedes parameters_panel.py) over speculative reorganizations (src/avcs/ migration only if scouts surface strong evidence). Author all batches in low-risk-first order so high-risk Extract Class operations are gated behind successful low-risk batches.
